what: Phase-2 sanity validation of the three production flows (scripts/run_validate_npe.py, 200 fresh sims/level, seed 20260611). Recovery Pearson r, 90% credible-interval coverage, median 90%-CI width as fraction of prior width. NOT the rigorous SBC/TARP pass (Phase 3).
note: Recovery improves with counts (mean r 0.69 -> 0.80 -> 0.88); posterior widths shrink monotonically with counts for every parameter; but the quick 90% credible-interval coverage proxy is already below nominal at all levels and is lowest at bright (joint 0.59/0.60/0.41), i.e. the flows grow over-confident as counts grow, the raw-NPE under-coverage that Phase 3 quantifies rigorously.
